title: Cells, Walls, Passages, Boundaries, and Invariants · Program Defense
summary: A release reviewer compares near-miss decisions for cells, walls, passages, boundaries, and invariants and accepts only runnable changed-case evidence, explicit limitations, and named browser, Tcl, Tk, display, input, assistive-technology, file, package, and production transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for reciprocal wall and passage model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence d…
objectives: Represent north, east, south, and west walls or passage edges with one documented ownership policy.
Carve a passage as one atomic reciprocal update between adjacent cells.
Preserve outer-boundary rules while supporting explicit entrance and exit exceptions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-maze-solver-python cumulative accessible desktop maze portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python grid, graph, search, state, and scheduler models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts,
focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, display scaling,
packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazePolicy:
    rows: int = 12
    columns: int = 16
    seed: int = 314159
    maximum_cells: int = 16_384
    reduced_motion: bool = False


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazeEvidence:
    revision: str
    topology_digest: str
    action_trace_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str
    artifact_digest: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python maze solver portfolio ready"

steps.title: Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Topology Validation
steps.instruction:
Write the quiz evidence note for Topology Validation: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A quiz puzzle team handles case 5139 during a corrupted-state recovery drill. Build deterministic Python evidence to validate reciprocal passages, boundary policy, and model topology before rendering; resource use must remain below an explicit budget; then change the grid dimensions and preserve every invariant. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, and packaged desktop behavior require explicit controlled native transfer gates. Competency probe: Reconcile cell count, neighbor pairs, reciprocal openings, boundary exceptions, and illegal diagonal links.

Evidence target: Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Topology Validation.
steps.why: Retrieving Topology Validation through the concrete reciprocal wall and passage model case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide.
